title: Keep lychee under hk instead of a separate mise task
description:
Why this issue exists and what needs to be done:
- follow-up decision: lychee should stay managed by hk rather than a standalone mise task/workflow job
- remove the dedicated mise links task and CI job
- restore lychee as an hk step

What needs to be done:
- update mise.toml tasks
- update hk.pkl to restore lychee
- update CI workflow to remove the separate links job
- run focused checks for the updated hk setup
notes: Removed the standalone mise links task and CI links job. Restored lychee under hk and added temporary excludes for .beads/** and internal/** so intentional test/example URLs do not fail the hook. Focused checks pass: hk validate, hk lychee, hk actionlint, hk zizmor, hk mise.

title: Resolve surfaced staticcheck findings
description:
Why this issue exists and what needs to be done:
- the simplified hk stack now reaches staticcheck, which reports existing issues in the Go codebase
- these findings block a fully green 'mise run check' even though the tooling simplification itself is complete

What needs to be done:
- address the current staticcheck findings:
  - internal/devcontainer/feature_options.go:107 U1000 unused contains
  - internal/devcontainer/spec_compose.go:154 U1000 unused isNumericString
  - internal/featurefetch/featurefetch.go:360 SA1019 deprecated tar.TypeRegA
  - internal/policy/workspace.go:36 ST1005 punctuation in error string
  - internal/reconcile/container_executor.go:158 U1000 unused selectBestContainerID
  - internal/reconcile/container_selection.go:72 U1000 unused inspectContainerWithEngine
- rerun mise run check after cleanup

title: Simplify hk toolchain and remove overlapping linters
description:
Why this issue exists and what needs to be done:
- simplify the hk/mise toolchain to reduce overlap and maintenance cost
- remove redundant or low-ROI linters from hk and mise
- keep trivy scanning unchanged even while removing other overlapping tools
- remove govulncheck per current decision

What needs to be done:
- update mise.toml tool declarations
- update hk.pkl hooks/checks to remove selected tools
- update the mise lockfile
- keep trivy fs invocation unchanged
- run project checks and verify the new minimal set works
notes: Simplified hk/mise toolchain, replaced ghalint with zizmor, moved lychee to a dedicated CI task/workflow, kept trivy fs unchanged, and updated mise.lock. mise run links passes. mise run check now reaches staticcheck and surfaces existing findings tracked in hatchctl-wjd.
